title: Add meal
subtitle: Choose how to add your meal
textDesc: Describe your meal and AI will estimate it
barcodeDesc: Scan or enter a product code
aiDesc: Snap a photo of your meal
aiTextDesc: Describe your meal and AI will estimate calories and macros
describe_meal_quick_description_placehol: Chicken bowl with rice, cucumber and tahini.
manualDesc: Start a blank review and edit details if needed
saved_list_title: Reuse one of your saved meals
saved_list_subtitle: Pick a saved meal, review it, and log it again when you're ready.
saved_list_empty_description: Save a meal after review to reuse it here.
camera_permission_blocked_message: Enable camera access in settings to scan meals and barcodes.
barcode_camera_permission_blocked_messag: Enable camera access in settings to scan barcodes.
camera_default_subtitle: Center the full meal in the frame. One photo is enough to start.
camera_replace_subtitle: Take a new photo to update the current draft.
camera_low_credits_note: Only {{count}} credits left after this photo
camera_no_credits_subtitle: You need 1 credit to continue. Choose another path below.
camera_no_credits_note: 0 left. Manual, barcode, and saved still work.
continue_draft_message: You have an unfinished meal draft. Do you want to continue or start over?
resume_draft_message: You already have an unfinished meal draft. Continue it or discard it before starting something new.
resume_draft_sheet_message: Pick up where you left off, or discard it and start fresh.
not_recognized_sub: Try again or select other method
not_recognized_last: Please add the meal manually or try later.
ai_unavailable_sub: We couldn't connect to AI analysis. You can enter ingredients manually or use the product database.
ai_offline_sub: Reconnect to the internet and try again, or add ingredients manually.
ai_timeout_sub: The analysis took too long. Please try again in a moment.
text_ai_require_quick_description: Add a quick description to continue.
text_ai_not_recognized_retry: We couldn't recognize this meal. Adjust the details and try again.
text_ai_error_offline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again.
text_ai_error_timeout: The analysis took too long. Please try again.
text_ai_error_unavailable: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
text_ai_error_auth: Please sign in again to continue.
text_ai_analyze_failed: We couldn't analyze this meal. Please try again.
text_ai_low_credits_note: Only {{count}} credits left after this analysis
text_analyzing_subtitle: We're turning your description into a meal summary now.
text_analyzing_footer: Review opens automatically. If this takes longer, you can edit the text.
preparing_review_subtitle: Photo analysis has started. Review Meal opens automatically when the first result is ready.
preparing_review_footer: Review Meal opens automatically. No action needed.
preparing_review_slow_title: This is taking a bit longer
preparing_review_slow_subtitle: We're still working on the photo. You can keep waiting or switch to manual entry.
preparing_review_failed_subtitle: This photo didn't give us a reliable meal summary this time.
preparing_review_offline_subtitle: Finish later when you're back online, or add it manually now.
review_meal_subtitle: Check the summary, adjust details if needed, then save.
review_meal_quick_check_note: If something looks off, edit details before saving.
review_meal_edit_subtitle: Update ingredients, meal type or time, then go back to review.
review_meal_time_sheet_hint: Adjust the meal time, then apply.
meal_invalid_values: Values must be non-negative and amount must be greater than 0
ingredient_invalid_values: Values must be non-negative and amount must be greater than 0
confirm_exit_message: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, they won't be saved.
saveMealsToReuse: Create and save meals to reuse them later

history.deadLetterSubtitle: Retry sends them back to sync. Pending meal changes: {{pending}}.
history.deadLetterSubtitleWithLast: Retry sends them back to sync. Pending meal changes: {{pending}}. Last failed: {{operation}}.
history.offlineEmpty: No local data. Connect to the internet to load history.

savedMeals.loadMoreError: Could not load more saved meals.
savedMeals.offlineEmpty: No local data. Connect to the internet to load saved meals.

barcode_scan_subtitle: Point the camera at the barcode. We will ask you to confirm the number before searching.
barcode_scan_preview_label: Place the code inside the frame
barcode_scan_detected_subtitle: We found a barcode. Search for the product or edit the code first.
barcode_scan_sheet_subtitle: Type the numbers under the bars if scanning is difficult.
barcode_scan_sheet_helper: Numeric input only. Usually 8 to 13 digits.
barcode_scan_invalid_code: Enter a valid barcode to continue.
barcode_scan_lookup_error: We couldn't search this barcode right now. Try again.
barcode_scan_not_found_error: We couldn't find a product for this barcode. Edit the code or try another method.
cancel_edit_message: Do you want to discard your changes?
discard_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them?
leave_edit_message: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, they won't be saved.
leave_without_saving_message: If you leave now, your changes won't be saved.
premium_required_body: AI mode is available with Premium.
recalc_message: Changing the amount can automatically recalculate calories and macros. Recalculate now?

detailsUnavailable.title: Meal details unavailable
detailsUnavailable.desc: We couldn't load this meal right now. Try again.
detailsUnavailable.offlineDesc: You're offline and this meal is not available in local storage.

editUnavailable.title: Meal editor unavailable
editUnavailable.desc: We couldn't load this saved meal for editing right now. Try again.
editUnavailable.offlineDesc: You're offline and this saved meal is not available in local storage.

reviewMealUnavailable.title: Meal review unavailable
reviewMealUnavailable.desc: We couldn't load this meal draft right now. Try again.
reviewMealUnavailable.offlineDesc: You're offline and this meal draft is not available locally.
reviewMealUnavailable.authDesc: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.

review_meal_edit_ingredients_subtitle: Review ingredients and adjust anything that looks off.
review_meal_edit_no_ingredients_descript: Add ingredients to make this summary more complete.
